summary: Resolve issues #17, #18, #19, and #16 through roadmap/state sync checks, Windows-compatible DB context snapshot controls, harness doctor diagnostics, and phase command distribution/routing. Docker scope excluded.
next_action: Commit, push, and open a PR for Issue #16 phase command distribution/routing on branch codex/issue-16-phase-command-routing; do not modify PR #15.
acceptance_criteria: ADR/phase changes have a documented and tested roadmap/state sync invariant.
Doctor detects roadmap/state drift and reports severity/cause/impact/fix.
Windows users can run DB snapshot refresh using the same Python loader via .env or ignored JSON config.
DB context snapshot supports full and selected collection for tables, stored procedures, and jobs without connecting in offline mode.
Skill and command docs expose the same DB snapshot option vocabulary.
Secret-bearing DB context config and generated snapshot artifacts remain gitignored.
Doctor reports include diff-before-mutation guidance and do not mutate files.
Existing Linux/macOS command paths remain valid.
verification: python3 -m py_compile scripts/harness.py scripts/test_harness.py scripts/db_context_snapshot.py scripts/test_db_context_snapshot.py
notes: Issue #16 command distribution/routing was implemented on a new branch; PR #15 was used as reference only and not modified.
Docker-related changes are blocked by user instruction.
No DB connection is allowed unless DB snapshot refresh is explicit.

auto_selected.reason: ROADMAP already reserved Phase 4 for template consumer onboarding, and #17-#19 improve consumer adoption and operation.
